title: Longest Common Subsequence
problem_statement: Find the length of the longest subsequence common to two strings.
intuition: Use DP on prefixes of both strings, matching characters or skipping one side.

approaches.name: 2D DP on prefixes
approaches.description: dp[i][j] is the length of the LCS of text1[0..i-1] and text2[0..j-1].
approaches.why_not: Trying all subsequence pairs is exponential.

interview_qa.a: Match characters to extend by one; otherwise take the max of skipping one character from either string.
Use two rolling arrays because each row depends only on the previous row.
